title: Determination of Non-Daylighted Area
full_text:
4.3.2.4 Determination of Non-Daylighted Area
Determination of Non-Daylighted Area
1) The non-daylighted area of a space, ANDL,i, in m2, shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: F_{occ,i} = 1 - C_{A,i} \times C_{occ,ctrl,i}] [Equation: F_{occ,i} = 1 - C_{A,i} \times C_{occ,ctrl,i}] where Ai = gross interior floor area of the space, in m2, and ADL,i = daylighted area of that space, in m2.

sentences.text: The non-daylighted area of a space, ANDL,i, in m2, shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: F_{occ,i} = 1 - C_{A,i} \times C_{occ,ctrl,i}] [Equation: F_{occ,i} = 1 - C_{A,i} \times C_{occ,ctrl,i}] where Ai = gross interior floor area of the space, in m2, and ADL,i = daylighted area of that space, in m2.
